scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,admin "npm run dev -w @voting/registration-api" "npm run dev -w @voting/registration-admin"
scripts.check: npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run build
scripts.test:integration: docker compose --profile test up -d --wait postgres-test && DATABASE_URL=postgresql://voting:voting@localhost:15433/registration_test?schema=public npm run db:migrate -w @voting/registration-api && DATABASE_URL=postgresql://voting:voting@localhost:15433/registration_test?schema=public ALLOW_DATABASE_RESET=true npm run test:integration -w @voting/registration-api
